Contact us
The Joint Committee has completed its work on the draft Bill. For questions about the Online Safety Bill please call 020 7219 3251. For questions specifically about the former Joint Committee, please email: draftbills@parliament.uk.
Email:
scrutiny@parliament.uk
Address:
Joint Committee on Draft Online Safety Bill, House of Lords, London SW1A 0PW
